_comment: Shadow AI — OpenClaw Configuration Template. Copy to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json and fill in your API keys.

env._comment: Replace all REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_* values with real keys
env._recall_hint: Get from https://www.recall.ai — free trial available
env._assemblyai_hint: Get from https://www.assemblyai.com — free tier available
env._google_hint: Get from https://console.cloud.google.com — enable Gmail API, create Desktop app OAuth2 credentials

channels._comment: Configure at least one channel. Run: openclaw channels login telegram

cron._comment: Scheduled tasks. Times are in Asia/Kolkata (IST) timezone.

jobs.message: Generate and send morning briefing for Magic Bus project
Generate and send weekly project summary for Magic Bus
Check inbox for new Magic Bus emails and summarize
